name: laravel-inertia-vue
description: Comprehensive patterns for building modern monolithic applications with Laravel, Inertia.js, and Vue 3. Covers page components, forms, navigation, shared data, and persistent layouts.
author: Asyraf Hussin

references.name: Inertia.js Documentation
references.description: Official Inertia.js documentation covering Vue adapter, routing, forms, and more

references.name: Laravel Documentation
references.description: Laravel framework documentation for backend API and routing

references.name: Vue 3 Documentation
references.description: Official Vue 3 documentation for Composition API, components, and TypeScript

references.name: Ziggy Documentation
references.description: Use Laravel named routes in JavaScript with type safety

page-components.title: Page Components
page-components.description: Standard structure for Inertia page components with TypeScript typing and layout assignment using Vue 3 Composition API

forms.title: Forms & Validation
forms.description: Complete form handling with useForm composable, validation, file uploads, and state management

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: SPA-like navigation with Link component and router for programmatic navigation

shared-data.title: Shared Data
shared-data.description: Global props shared across all pages including auth, flash messages, and config

layouts.title: Layouts
layouts.description: Persistent layouts that maintain state across navigation for better performance
